Older Adults 
Summary 
What are mobility aids? 
Mobility aids help you walk or move from place to place if you have a disability or an injury.
Types of mobility aids can include:
Crutches 
Canes 
Walkers 
Wheelchairs 
Motorized scooters 
Prostheses, a device to rep
